overview: AITech Innovations is a UK-based web design and automation support business for professional service businesses.
website_services: Website design for clinics, solicitors, accountants, trades, property teams, care providers, and other professional service businesses.
Website redesign for businesses with outdated or unclear websites.
Landing pages for offers, launches, ads, and individual high-value services.
Enquiry and booking setup, including quote forms, WhatsApp enquiry links, email routes, and booking links.
Basic SEO setup, including page titles, descriptions, local keywords, technical basics, and indexing support.
Hostinger upload, domain connection, SSL checks, and launch support.
automation_services: Practical AI automation advice for small businesses.
Workflow review to identify repetitive admin, enquiry handling, lead follow-up, booking, and customer support opportunities.
Simple website chatbot planning for FAQs, service guidance, lead capture, and handoff to WhatsApp or booking.
Automation recommendations that avoid heavy jargon and focus on useful business outcomes.
positioning: Keep recommendations practical and suitable for small businesses.
Focus on enquiry quality, trust, speed, mobile usability, simple pricing, and easy contact routes.
Avoid promising guaranteed results or claiming specific outcomes unless provided by the team.
